value="<b>状态清零</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#555">membrane_q[32] = 0<br>spike_count[32] = 0<br><i>每次 top function 调用前<br>状态不跨样本/被试继承</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;arcSize=14;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>电流积分</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#555">membrane_q = decayed + I_q[t][c]<br>I_q = feature_current_q (Q12.6, ap_int<12>)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="230" x="300" y="448" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lif_spike" parent="1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;arcSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>冻结 Linear(32, 2)</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#555">logits_q[k] = round(<br>Σ rate_q[c]×W_q[k][c] / 64<br>) + bias_q[k]<br><i>Q12.6 整数运算, 无 softmax</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="190" x="825" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;arcSize=5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;fontSize=11;" value="<b>时钟与证据边界</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="600" x="40" y="697" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clock_content" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;resizable=0;points=[];strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="<font style="font-size:9px;color:#444"><b>HLS-3 综合约束:</b> 10 ns / 100 MHz (C 综合阶段的可行性约束)<br>• Estimated clock = 7.249 ns, Fmax ≈ 137.95 MHz, Slack = 0.05 ns<br>• Top latency = 1688 cycles ≈ 16.88 μs @ 100 MHz<br>• 资源: DSP=33(15%), FF=1980(1%), LUT=2405(4%), BRAM=0, URAM=0<br><br><b>CNN-LSTM Vivado 系统实际 PS FCLK_CLK0:</b> 20 ns / 50 MHz<br>• 50 MHz 是后续复用 CNN-LSTM Vivado 系统时的实际 PL 时钟<br>• 1688 cycles @ 50 MHz = 33.76 μs<br><br><font color="#b85450"><b>⚠ 100 MHz 综合通过 ≠ 板端已运行在 100 MHz</b></font><br>当前仍未完成 Vivado implementation 和板端回放</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="580" x="50" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ny_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 4;arcSize=5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666;" value="<b>尚未完成 (Not Yet Implemented)</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#888">• AXI / DMA 接口<br>• Vivado Block Design<br>• Bitstream 生成<br>• 板端回放 (Board replay)<br>• 功耗测量 (Power measurement)<br>• EEG 数据集准确率测量<br>• 片上 ROM 绑定模型常量<br>• CNN / GroupNorm 前端 HLS 化<br>• 50 MHz Vivado 集成 (HLS-5)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="165" width="280" x="660" y="702" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="syn_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fff0;strokeColor=#82b366;arcSize=5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;fontSize=10;fontColor=#333;" value="<b>HLS-3 综合结果</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#444">Tool: Vitis HLS 2025.1<br>Part: xc7z020-clg400-1<br>CSim: 3/3 golden PASS<br>CSynth: PASS<br>HLS-4 RTL Cosim: 3/3 PASS<br><br><b>Top function:</b><br>hybrid_lif_head_q12_6</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="165" width="280" x="960" y="702" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
HLS-3 综合约束: 10 ns / 100 MHz (C 综合阶段的可行性约束)
• Estimated clock = 7.249 ns, Fmax ≈ 137.95 MHz, Slack = 0.05 ns
• Top latency = 1688 cycles ≈ 16.88 μs @ 100 MHz
• 资源: DSP=33(15%), FF=1980(1%), LUT=2405(4%), BRAM=0, URAM=0
CNN-LSTM Vivado 系统实际 PS FCLK_CLK0: 20 ns / 50 MHz
• 50 MHz 是后续复用 CNN-LSTM Vivado 系统时的实际 PL 时钟
• 1688 cycles @ 50 MHz = 33.76 μs
⚠ 100 MHz 综合通过 ≠ 板端已运行在 100 MHz
当前仍未完成 Vivado implementation 和板端回放

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 703px; margin-left: 631px;

div.span:
• AXI / DMA 接口
• Vivado Block Design
• Bitstream 生成
• 板端回放 (Board replay)
• 功耗测量 (Power measurement)
• EEG 数据集准确率测量
• 片上 ROM 绑定模型常量
• CNN / GroupNorm 前端 HLS 化
• 50 MHz Vivado 集成 (HLS-5)
